strengths: Critical isolation filter `AND board_id IS NULL` present in getHumanColumns (server/src/routes.ts:663) and GET /board routes through it (server/src/routes.ts:707), with the downstream columns.map shape preserved unchanged
Query-contract test exercises the real helper and goes RED if the filter is removed; also guards against an `IS NOT NULL` partial-match regression (server/src/agent/service.test.ts:20-21)
Helper extracted cleanly with explicit Queryable (Pick<typeof pool, 'query'>) and HumanColumn types, matching the real pg.Pool surface (server/src/routes.ts:646-667)
agent-schema.sql is idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS throughout), with correct FK CASCADEs, CHECK constraints on status/execution_status/role, and supporting indexes
columns.board_id added nullable plus slug/reasoning/system_prompt agent metadata per QUALITY BAR (server/src/db/agent-schema.sql:35-39); core/* and card_events untouched
migrate.ts applies schema.sql then agent-schema.sql inside one BEGIN/COMMIT, satisfying the W3 FK-ordering verification (agent_boards created before ALTER TABLE columns ... REFERENCES agent_boards)

issues.description: agent_boards.updated_at defaults to now() but has no auto-update trigger; updates won't refresh it. Not required by spec/plan for Phase 1.
